# Arc Agent Payment Boundary Demo

A pre/post-payment boundary layer for AI agents using USDC on Arc Testnet.
This is a testnet demo. It does not execute payments or custody funds.

## When to use

- Before an AI agent performs a USDC payment on Arc Testnet (call /check first)
- After an Arc Testnet payment tx hash is available (call /record)
- When an audit trail of payment decisions is needed (call /report)

## When NOT to use

- To execute payments (this API does not submit transactions)
- To store or handle private keys or seed phrases
- For production custody or fund management
- For legal, tax, or compliance decisions
- As a replacement for production-grade audit storage

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /health | Health check and Arc Testnet configuration |
| POST | /api/arc/payment/check | Pre-payment check: budget, risk, approval |
| POST | /api/arc/payment/record | Post-payment record: tx hash, audit trail |
| GET | /api/arc/payment/report/{agent_id} | Payment audit report for an agent |

## Call flow

1. AI agent calls `POST /api/arc/payment/check`
   - Input: agent_id, payer_wallet, payee_wallet, amount_usdc, purpose, risk_context, limits
   - Output: allowed (bool), risk_level, check_result_id

2. If allowed=true: wallet/user executes the Arc Testnet USDC payment externally
   - This demo does NOT execute the payment
   - Obtain the tx_hash from the wallet or ArcScan

3. AI agent calls `POST /api/arc/payment/record`
   - Input: agent_id, check_result_id, tx_hash, arcscan_url, amount_usdc, payment_status
   - Output: record_id, audit_ready

4. AI agent (or human auditor) calls `GET /api/arc/payment/report/{agent_id}`
   - Output: total_payments, total_amount_usdc, payment_records with tx hashes, audit_ready_count

## Arc Testnet configuration

- Chain ID: 5042002
- RPC: https://rpc.testnet.arc.network
- Explorer: https://testnet.arcscan.app

## Constraints

- does_not_execute_payments: true
- does_not_custody_funds: true
- does_not_handle_private_keys: true
- does_not_handle_seed_phrases: true
- testnet_only: true
- not_affiliated_with_circle_or_arc: true
- local_json_storage_demo_only: true

## Service URL

https://arc-agent-payment-boundary-demo-1.onrender.com

## Source

https://github.com/sasuke15134321/arc-agent-payment-boundary-demo
